patch.value: pm validate --auto-fix: apply safe remediations automatically (GH-179, GH-153 interactive part, GH-167 backfill part)

validate has --fix-hints; add --auto-fix to apply the safe subset (metadata backfill via update-many semantics, stale file unlink with confirmation, lifecycle reparent suggestions). Covers automation asks from GitHub issues #179, #167, #153.

value.author: validate-autofix-agent
value.text: DESIGN pm validate --auto-fix: (1) SAFE = deterministic + derivable + non-destructive. Implemented safe fixes: closed item missing resolution -> backfill from its own close_reason (else 'completed' default); closed item missing close_reason -> backfill from its existing resolution. expected/actual stay hint-only (no derivable source). Auto-fix NEVER closes/cancels/deletes items. (2) --dry-run previews; output has fixes.{planned,applied,gated,failed}_fixes[] where each row = item_id + check + field + equivalent pm command. (3) --fix-scope <scope> (repeatable or comma-separated; metadata|resolution|lifecycle) is an EXACT allowlist of what may be mutated; default grant = metadata+resolution; lifecycle must be named explicitly (pm-8jss). (4) --auto-fix with no --check-* flags runs only the fix-capable checks (metadata, resolution, lifecycle). (5) Fixes are applied through the normal audited runUpdate/runFiles/runDocs command paths (lazy-imported so read-only validate stays light); per-fix failures land in failed_fixes[] and never abort the run. Checks in the output always reflect the PRE-fix state. Plan logic is pure in src/core/validate/fix-planning.ts.

patch.value: validate can apply the safe subset of fix-hint remediations automatically with preview support and per-fix reporting

Implemented --auto-fix/--dry-run/--fix-scope: derivable resolution and close_reason backfills applied through audited runUpdate; fixes.planned/applied/gated/failed_fixes rows carry item id, field, and equivalent pm command; full flag wiring across commander, contracts, MCP tables, completions, docs
Shipped pm validate --auto-fix with --dry-run, --fix-scope allowlist, and fixes output surface
